stemHtml: A runway-in-use for landing operations has been selected for noise abatement purposes. For this runway a full ILS CAT I is available and the runway condition is reported dry. The surface wind is calm, the visibility is 5000 m and the ceiling is 5000 ft. This runway-in-use can…

options.a: NO longer be used when the ceiling lowers to 2500 ft.
options.b: Be refused by the Pilot-In-Command for safety reasons.
options.c: NO longer be used when the visibility decreases to 2500 m.
options.d: Still be selected for this purpose with a Localiser-only approach.
